entry.title: Custom entity on public cloud RAP
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I created a CDS based on a custom entity in SAP RAP cloud. I added a new button to this CDS. This button will perform an action on all records displayed on the screen. However, in the class I defined in the behavior, I cannot read the data on the screen. How can I do it?

entry.title: Restrict concurrent employment from SuccessFactors replication
entry.content:
Hi All

We need the concurrent employment function in SF but upon replicating the employee to HCM system using program: ECPAO_EE_ORG_REPL_QUERY, we need only the primary employment and the secondary employment should not be replicated.

Currently, when replicating the employee (who has both primary and secondary employment created in SF) to HCM system, we are getting below error “Pernr XXXXXX can't be used as it is already assigned to a different Userid XXXXX”.

Could not get any BAdI to restrict the secondary employment. Appreciate your suggestions.

 

Regards

Vinoth

entry.title: Re: Has anyone made a step-by-step tutorial for abap-plat...
entry.content:
Anser to myself.

I found that the current version on Github has a good guide for running the Docker container on windows:

SAP-docs/abap-platform-trial-image: End user documentation for ABAP Platform Trial image (github.com)

The FAQ gives info about how to set up SAPGui, but now clue about where to download and how to install SAPGui. The FAQ actually says "Install the SAP GUI that fits to your operating system, attached here", but nothing is attached, so I will raise a new question for that.

entry.title: A Leap Forward in Encryption: TLS 1.3 Support in S/4HANA
entry.content:
TLS is a cryptographic protocol designed to provide secure communication over a computer network. It is used to establish a secure connection between a client and a server to ensure that the data exchanged is private and reliable.

The Benefits of TLS 1.3

The introduction of TLS1.3 in SAP S/4HANA 2023 brings several benefits designed to enhance security and streamline processes:

  1. Simplified and stronger cipher suites: TLS 1.3 removes support for outdated and potentially insecure algorithms and ciphers, focusing on a more streamlined and secure set. This simplification reduces the potential for misconfigurations and vulnerabilities while strengthening the overall security posture of your communications.
  2. Perfect Forward Secrecy (PFS) always enabled: With PFS enabled, each TLS session has a unique session key which cannot be recovered by learning the private key, ensuring that your session keys will not be compromised even if the server's private key is. In TLS1.3, PFS is always enabled, enhancing the confidentiality of your data.
  3. Simplified key exchange: TLS 1.3 only supports Diffie-Hellman type key exchange algorithms, removing support for RSA key exchange. This simplifies the key exchange process and eliminates potential vulnerabilities associated with RSA key exchange.

How to Configure TLS 1.3 in SAP S/4HANA OnPremise

Before configuring TLS 1.3, please make sure your system fits the version and patch requirements as detailed in SAP Note 3318423.

TLS versions can be configured via profile parameters. The following cipher suites are recommended by SAP for maximum interoperability, activating TLS 1.2 - 1.3 on the server (inbound) side, and TLS 1.0 - 1.3 on the client (outbound) side:

 Parameter NameParameter Value
Server (inbound)ssl/ciphersuites1569:PFS:HIGH::EC_X25519:EC_P256:EC_HIGH
Client (outbound)ssl/client_ciphersuites1174:PFS:HIGH::EC_X25519:EC_P256:EC_HIGH

As a note of caution: If your previous inbound configuration included TLS 1.0 - 1.1, please take a look at SAP Note 3346659 for how to safely restart your system after deactivating TLS 1.0 - 1.1.

If you prefer to have your inbound side open to TLS 1.0 - 1.1 as well as TLS 1.2 - 1.3, you can use the following parameter instead of the above one:

 Parameter NameParameter Value
Server (inbound)ssl/ciphersuites1159:PFS:HIGH::EC_X25519:EC_P256:EC_HIGH

If you would like to restrict your outbound communication to TLS 1.2 and 1.3 only, the following values are recommended:

 Parameter NameParameter Value
Client (outbound)ssl/client_ciphersuites1584:PFS:HIGH::EC_X25519:EC_P256:EC_HIGH

Please note that SAP currently does not recommend setting the cipher suite string parameter to TLS 1.2 and 1.3 for the outbound side, as this may cause interoperability issues when trying to communicate with older servers. Especially older embedded devices often do not support TLS 1.2 and upwards. Therefore, please verify that you have no incompatible servers in your system landscape before making such a change. You can read more about how to safely configure restrictive parameters for your system in SAP Note 3346659.

It is also possible to configure TLS 1.3 for specific clients in transaction sm59. For type G or H destinations, go to the tab "Logon & Security" and add your custom cipher suite string value in the field "TLS Cipher Suites".

This approach is especially recommended if you would like to activate TLS 1.3 systemwide, but have specific servers in your landscape which do not support TLS 1.3 and behave erroneously when a client tries to establish a TLS 1.3 connection. In this case, you can disable TLS 1.3 for these specific servers via the configuration shown in the above image.

Please also see the sm59 documentation for more details.

TLS 1.3 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

TLS 1.3 is activated by default in all SAP S/4HANA Cloud Web Dispatchers. You can read more about it in this article.

Relevant SAP Notes for Further Information

SAP has released several SAP Notes explaining which software versions, patch levels, and configurations are required to enable TLS 1.3 for SAP S/4HANA:

3318423 - Is TLS 1.3 Supported by SAP Kernel for ABAP and SAP S/4HANA?
3346659 - TLS Ciphersuite String Configuration for ABAP and SAP Kernel-Based Systems

Conclusion

The support of TLS 1.3 is a significant leap forward for SAP S/4HANA 2023. It simplifies configurations, enhances security through stronger cipher suites, and ensures the safety of your communication through PFS and a simplified key exchange.

entry.title: Re: SAP Warehouse Operator Version 2.4 - What's new?

entry.title: Re: Kyma Capacity Units Calculation
entry.content:
Hi Simon,
This save is only for the dashboard settings.

Any configuration you do on Kyma, I would recommend doing it via Infrastructure as code. That way, it would be easier to regenerate all config. Just a matter of running a pipeline or doing GitOps.

Furthermore, you can use BTP Terraform provider to even automate provisioning of Kyma runtime.

Ref: https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/terraform-sap-btp-above-beyond-christian-lechner-gdf7f/ 

Thanks,

Gaurav

entry.title: How to create BRF+ for SAP21 FI Customer Invoice ?

S2: after extracted the downloaded form template then made the changes in Adobe LiveCycle Designer and save the form and uploaded in the Maintain form template.

 

S3: maintain the CBC like below steps

 

 

 

S4: now providing the Output parameter determination

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

S5: now trying to create correspondence i am getting an error


Can anyone explain did i miss any step or any configuration.

Note: If we provide the standard form template it is working properly.

Thanks and Regards ,

Gowthami Gunji

entry.title: Re: DRF - Business Partner replication - disable confirma...
entry.content: Hello Michael, Thank you for your message. I suspected that the confirmation is important, but I couldn't find any information on it. Especially since all fields within the message are marked as optional. However, we are facing the issue that many messages in srt_moni are in the status "WAIT ON SCHEDULER" and the processing takes a very long time. The idea was to disable the confirmation message and this halving the message load. Do you have any other suggestion for where to start with the configuration of the bgRFC queue to speed up the processing? Best regards, Stefan

entry.title: Shipment number: To set it to external numbering and automatically assign it like internal numbering
entry.content:
We are currently considering developing a system where the number range is set to an external number during shipment registration (T-cd: VT01N) and the number is automatically assigned like an internal number.

Therefore, we would like to ask the following questions to the experts.

①When registering an INVOICE with VT01N, etc., is there an EXIT that would retrieve the INVOICE number?

②We are considering how to handle this in the class “IF_EX_BADI_LE_SHIPMENT~AT_SAVE”.
However, in Include “MV56AF99N_FCODE_ROUTINES”, “Check external number” is output as an error first.

Ideally, the logic want be such that the external numbering is done automatically by “IF_EX_BADI_LE_SHIPMENT~AT_SAVE”.

<Ideal example>
External number range “A0001~A9999
A00~” is automatically assigned without entering the invoice number in the following screen.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Sybase Update
entry.content:
Hi,

you can try using saphostctrl with the force option, which should go through all the relevant update steps again for ASE.

 

Cheers

Tony

entry.title: How to find which users has activated Fiori Spaces manually using SQL
entry.content:
Background: 
you are starting to use Spaces in Fiori Launchpad and want to switch the global setting but want to know how many users that still not have activated the Spaces setting.

Analysis:
The table SPERS_OBJ is where the flag is stored.

What we need to look for is the following value and fetch the ADD_KEY that groups this setting:

PERS_KEY = '/UI2/USER_PROFILE'
FIELDVALUE = 'SPACES_ENABLEMENT'

We can now use the ADD_KEY to find the attributes connected to the SPACES_ENABLEMENT Setting.
SE16N by looking at the ADD_KEY from SPACES_ENABLEMENT entry

Now we can locate that FIELDNAME = "VALUE" controls the flag so where FIELDVALUE = 'X' the flag has been set.
 
Solution:
The solution requires the need to define an SQL join statement.
This SQL statement will list all users that have the Spaces active right now.

 

SELECT t1.OBJECT_ID fROM SPERS_OBJ t1
INNER JOIN SPERS_OBJ t2 ON t1.ADD_KEY = t2.ADD_KEY
WHERE t1.PERS_KEY = '/UI2/USER_PROFILE'
  AND t1.FIELDVALUE = 'SPACES_ENABLEMENT'
  AND t1.MANDT = 100
  AND t2.FIELDNAME = 'VALUE'
  AND t2.FIELDVALUE = 'X'

 

To select users that have activated and again deactivated the feature we simply will not find the VALUE = 'X' for the same ADD_KEY, so remove X and run again.

 

SELECT t1.OBJECT_ID fROM SPERS_OBJ t1
INNER JOIN SPERS_OBJ t2 ON t1.ADD_KEY = t2.ADD_KEY
WHERE t1.PERS_KEY = '/UI2/USER_PROFILE'
  AND t1.FIELDVALUE = 'SPACES_ENABLEMENT'
  AND t1.MANDT = 100
  AND t2.FIELDNAME = 'VALUE'
  AND t2.FIELDVALUE = ''

​

 

 

This should now result in a list of users which you then can compare towards the available users to know the scope of the change.

To analyse who that have activated the My home feature, the field FIELDVALUE = "MYHOME_ENABLEMENT".

Note that the ADD_KEY is regenerated every time the user modifies the setting.

entry.title: Re: Application Decisions for HR Payroll
entry.content:
Hi Michael.

I hope you can give me a hint.

What would be the neccessary SKU for migrating a standalone HCM on ECC in RISE?
The IAE proposes the following BOM for a 3 System landscape:

8012529 SAP Payroll Processing, private cloud edition, extra stack
8010814 SAP ERP, additional non-productive tier, private cloud edition (XS)

In the price List, the following license is listed for 8012529 as a prerequisite;

8008910 SAP Core Human Capital Management Cloud, private edition/ Upsell License /Generic Private Cloud / HCM core Functionality on S/4HANA or ERP. Validate Sizing of EM

Please advise.

Thank you & kind regards,

Patrik

Gunther

entry.title: Re: How to display action result data in Page using rules...
entry.content:
Hi @madhav15 

Try to redraw the section in your rule after setting the value in line# 11 or you can redraw the control based on the requirement. You can refer to the below sample for redrawing.

Redraw Control

clientAPI.evaluateTargetPath("#Page:PageName/#Control:ControlName").redraw();

Redraw Section

let pageProxy = clientAPI.getPageProxy();
let sectionView = pageProxy.getControl('ControlName').getSection('SectionName');
sectionView.redraw();

Thank you.

entry.title: Mashup from SAP Build Not Loading in SAP С4С Mobile App
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We created an application in SAP Build Apps and configured SSO authorization in SAP BTP. Then, we integrated the application into SAP Sales Cloud using an HTML mashup.

During testing on the PC browser, everything worked perfectly. However, when trying to run the application via the SAP C4C mobile app, the mashup does not load. In some cases, the mobile app shows a “domain not trusted” error, despite the URL being correctly added to the trusted domains in BTP.

The configuration appears to be correct, but the mashup isn’t functioning in the mobile version.

Has anyone faced similar issues with mashups in the mobile app? Any suggestions on how to resolve this would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Badi implementation in fb70
entry.content: I am implementing badi edoc_adaptor for changing edoc type in fb70 ...but in badi importing parameter io_source is object ... referring class cl_edoc_source  and cl_edoc_source has method get_data ... holding field symbol es_data ...so basically i wanted to access field symbol using get_data method but i dont know the approach

entry.title: Re: S4Hana private cloud - Adobe forms
entry.content:
Hi ruben_alvarez,
No, you do not necessarily need to use the SAP Forms Service in BTP for print reports in an S/4HANA Private Edition system. You can rely on Smart Forms, Adobe Forms (on-premise ADS), or even SAP Script if appropriate for the scenario. However, if cloud extension is a strategic direction, the SAP Forms Service in BTP can be a viable choice for more advanced use cases.

BR Serhii.

entry.title: converting SQL query to Hana
entry.content:
Hi experts ,i We have Migrated Our SAP B1 SQL DB TO SAP HANA and i want someone to help me in Writing the following query to HANA SQL :

/* SELECT FROM [dbo].[OITM] T0 */
DECLARE @ToItm AS nvarchar(20)
/* WHERE */
SET @ToItm= /* T0.ItemCode */ '[%0]'
DECLARE @Icode AS nvarchar(20)
DECLARE @Wcode AS nvarchar(20)
SET @Icode = $[INV1.ItemCode]
SET @Wcode = $[INV1.WhsCode]

IF @Icode IN (SELECT ItemCode FROM OBTN)
Begin
(
SELECT T0.ItemName 'اسم الصنف',T0.ItemCode 'كود الصنف',
T0.WhsCode 'المستودع' ,T0.BatchNumber 'رقم الدفعة', T0.Quantity 'الكمية'
FROM IBatchStock T0
WHERE T0.WhsCode = @Wcode
)
END
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If (len(@ToItm)-len(Replace(@ToItm,' ','')) )=0
Begin
SELECT T0.[ItemName],T0.[ItemCode],T1.[ItmsGrpNam],T5.[OnHand] AS 'العريمضي',T6.[OnHand] AS 'الصناعة',T7.[OnHand] AS 'البصيرية',T8.[OnHand] AS 'حفر الباطن', T0.[OnHand] as Stock,T2.PRICE CASH,T3.PRICE CREDIT
From
Oitm T0 INNER JOIN OITB T1 ON T0.[ItmsGrpCod] = T1.[ItmsGrpCod]
INNER JOIN ITM1 T2 ON T0.ITEMCODE = T2.ITEMCODE AND T2.PRICELIST=1
INNER JOIN ITM1 T3 ON T0.ITEMCODE = T3.ITEMCODE AND T3.PRICELIST=2
INNER JOIN OITW T5 on T0.ITEMCODE=T5.ITEMCODE AND T5.WhsCode='0101'
INNER JOIN OITW T6 on T0.ITEMCODE=T6.ITEMCODE AND T6.WhsCode='0201'
INNER JOIN OITW T7 on T0.ITEMCODE=T7.ITEMCODE AND T7.WhsCode='0301'
INNER JOIN OITW T8 on T0.ITEMCODE=T8.ITEMCODE AND T8.WhsCode='0401'
WHERE T0.[ItemName] like N'%' + @ToItm + '%' and T0.[OnHand]<>0 and T0.[ItemName] not like N'%خصم%'
End
If (len(@ToItm)-len(Replace(@ToItm,' ','')) )=2
begin
SELECT T0.[ItemName],T0.[ItemCode],T1.[ItmsGrpNam],T5.[OnHand] AS 'العريمضي',T6.[OnHand] AS 'الصناعة',T7.[OnHand] AS 'البصيرية',T8.[OnHand] AS 'حفر الباطن', T0.[OnHand] as Stock,T2.PRICE CASH,T3.PRICE CREDIT
From
Oitm T0 INNER JOIN OITB T1 ON T0.[ItmsGrpCod] = T1.[ItmsGrpCod]
INNER JOIN ITM1 T2 ON T0.ITEMCODE = T2.ITEMCODE AND T2.PRICELIST=1
INNER JOIN ITM1 T3 ON T0.ITEMCODE = T3.ITEMCODE AND T3.PRICELIST=2
INNER JOIN OITW T5 on T0.ITEMCODE=T5.ITEMCODE AND T5.WhsCode='0101'
INNER JOIN OITW T6 on T0.ITEMCODE=T6.ITEMCODE AND T6.WhsCode='0201'
INNER JOIN OITW T7 on T0.ITEMCODE=T7.ITEMCODE AND T7.WhsCode='0301'
INNER JOIN OITW T8 on T0.ITEMCODE=T8.ITEMCODE AND T8.WhsCode='0401'
WHERE T0.[ItemName] like N'%' + Substring(@ToItm,1,CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)-1 ) + '%'
and T0.[ItemName] like N'%' + Substring(@ToItm,CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)+1,(CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)+1))-CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)-1 ) + '%'
and T0.[ItemName] like N'%' + Substring(@ToItm,(CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)+1) +1),len(@ToItm)-(CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)+1) +1) +1 ) + '%'
and T0.[OnHand]<>0 and T0.[ItemName] not like N'%خصم%'
end
If (len(@ToItm)-len(Replace(@ToItm,' ','')) )=1
Begin
SELECT T0.[ItemName],T0.[ItemCode],T1.[ItmsGrpNam],T5.[OnHand] AS 'العريمضي',T6.[OnHand] AS 'الصناعة',T7.[OnHand] AS 'البصيرية',T8.[OnHand] AS 'حفر الباطن', T0.[OnHand] as Stock,T2.PRICE CASH,T3.PRICE CREDIT
From
Oitm T0 INNER JOIN OITB T1 ON T0.[ItmsGrpCod] = T1.[ItmsGrpCod]
INNER JOIN ITM1 T2 ON T0.ITEMCODE = T2.ITEMCODE AND T2.PRICELIST=1
INNER JOIN ITM1 T3 ON T0.ITEMCODE = T3.ITEMCODE AND T3.PRICELIST=2
INNER JOIN OITW T5 on T0.ITEMCODE=T5.ITEMCODE AND T5.WhsCode='0101'
INNER JOIN OITW T6 on T0.ITEMCODE=T6.ITEMCODE AND T6.WhsCode='0201'
INNER JOIN OITW T7 on T0.ITEMCODE=T7.ITEMCODE AND T7.WhsCode='0301'
INNER JOIN OITW T8 on T0.ITEMCODE=T8.ITEMCODE AND T8.WhsCode='0401'
WHERE T0.[ItemName] like N'%' + Substring(@ToItm,1,CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)-1 ) + '%'
and T0.[ItemName] like N'%' + Substring(@ToItm,CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1)+1,(Len(@ToItm)-CHARINDEX(' ',@ToItm,1) +1) ) + '%'
and T0.[OnHand]<>0 and T0.[ItemName] not like N'%خصم%'
End

entry.title: Where can I download SAPGUI for windows?
entry.content:
Hi

I know this question is asked many times before and I have read a lot o threads, but I still doesn't get it.

I have finally got a ABAP trial running on Docker following the Github guide  and even found the FAQ saying: 

  1. Install the SAP GUI that fits to your operating system, attached here.

But nothing is attached?

Other sources direct me to downloading SAPGui from Software Downloads (sap.com), but that requires a S-user. I suppose the purpose of a trial is that it should be available to people not having SAP and thus not having a S-user?

So, where can I get the SAPGui for the ABAP trial?

entry.title: Re: How to include service charge and special price updat...
entry.content:
Hi Tharindu, to avoid having charges on returns, just add the following exclude:

"exclusions": [{
"@type":"AmountBased",
"compareValueField": "GROSS_AMOUNT",
"compareOperator": "LESS",
"value": 0,
"onSalesItemLevel": true
}]

entry.title: Re: Freigth Unit Time Conflict Execution Block Inbound Sc...

entry.title: How ton pin a job requisition in recruiting management
entry.content:
Hello, 

Please i have two questions about the job requisitions tempalate . 

1- How can we pin a job requisition in recruiting management , to be first visible to candidate when he wants to apply ? 

2- it is possible to add a spontenous application in recruiting management ? 

PLEASE I NEED A RESPONSE ASAP !! 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: No PMR - Production material request EWM created
entry.content:
"Created on order and stimulated wm staging"

OK. But did you also trigger staging? You either need a production scheduling profile which does that (means the entry for "WM Request" is set to "2 Transfer Reqmt, Transfer Order, and Delivery Upon Release", or manually trigger the staging in the production order.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Re: Tax Code gets changed while copying from A/r Invoice...
entry.content:
Hi,

Try choosing the option "Use Base Tax Group" at Draw Document Wizard while copying the data from AR invoice to AR Credit memo. Screenshot attached for your reference.

entry.title: Re: PaPM cloud, how to calculate IRR
entry.content:
Hi @juancortes,

  IRR can be calculated by one of two common methods: Secant method, or Newton–Raphson method. For the iteration, you may leverage the view function of iterative type. Alternatively you may consider to use relative calculation to mimic the iteration by copying the same rule several times. - Based on my experience six copies would be sufficient in most cases. 

Best regards,

Zhiyi Tang

entry.title: com.crystaldecisions.sdk.occa.report.lib.ReportSDKException: rowIndex 오류가 발생하는데 원인을 알수 없습니다.
entry.content:
원인: java.lang.NoSuchFieldError: rowIndex

com.crystaldecisions.sdk.occa.report.lib.ReportSDKException: rowIndex

 

reportClientDoc.open("C://Statement_of_Account_2020.rpt", 0);

에서 아래와 같이 오류가 발생 하고 있습니다. 어떻게 해결 할수 있을까요?

 

 

 

com.crystaldecisions.sdk.occa.report.lib.ReportSDKException: rowIndex---- 오류 코드:-2147467259 오류 코드명:실패

com.businessobjects.reports.sdk.JRCCommunicationAdapter.<init>(SourceFile:288)에서

com.businessobjects.sdk.erom.jrc.a.<init>(SourceFile:43)에서

com.businessobjects.sdk.erom.jrc.ReportAgentFactory.createAgent (SourceFile : 46)에서

com.crystaldecisions.proxy.remoteagent.RemoteAgent $ a.<init> (SourceFile : 703)에서

com.crystaldecisions.proxy.remoteagent.RemoteAgent.a (SourceFile : 662)에서

com.crystaldecisions.proxy.remoteagent.RemoteAgent.a (SourceFile : 632)에서

com.crystaldecisions.sdk.occa.report.application.ClientDocument.if (SourceFile : 506)에서

com.crystaldecisions.sdk.occa.report.application.ClientDocument.open (SourceFile : 671)에서

entry.title: Re: Access to SAP Signavio Process Governance - 30 days T...
entry.content:
Hi Sudipta,

sorry for the inconvinience. Lately, it was not possible to add Process Governance to the trial. This is why it is mentioned to open a ticket to check if Process Governance can be added. I've been waiting for a response if it will be available any soon. If yes, I will let you know. 

Regards,

Elena

entry.title: Re: How to read workflow history
entry.content: Hello Martin, how can we check workflow history for supplier invoice who forwarded the invoice or etccc,, in sap public cloud

entry.title: Re: Add new folder tabs to BP form - B1 crashed when I cl...

entry.title: C_TS4FI_2023 and C_S4CFI_2408
entry.content:
Who passed C_TS4FI_2023 and/or C_S4CFI_2408? What was your rationale to complete any of these certifications? 

 What are advantages and disadvantages of C_TS4FI_2023 over C_S4CFI_2408 and vice versa? How passing these exams helped you to stay competitive in the job market?

entry.title: Re: Where do I get the Course Files (zip file) for practi...
entry.content: Yyo

entry.title: Change default delivery address of plant when creating PO
entry.content:
Dear all,

do you have an idea how to change the default delivery address which appears automatically, when entering a plant in a new PO? 

Thank you much.

Regards, Zoran

entry.title: Pool Asset Managment BC Set not available
entry.content:
Hello,

we try to setup the Pool Asset Management on a S4 2023 System, according to Customizing | SAP Help Portal.

There is an BC Set mentioned for the Notification-Type MF, but I cant the BC Set in our System. Is this no longer delivered, or where could I find this BC Set? (I also check the BC Set for the customizing-node).

I also check the obvious SAP-Notes (1743291, 1272432).

 

Regards

Christian

entry.title: Re: Customer has issues accessing SAP SQL Anywhere 17 EBF Download
entry.content: Only SQL Anywhere specific entitlements allow for access to the SQL Anywhere patches. If they are an end user of an application that embeds SQL Anywhere, they may not be entitled to SQL Anywhere. In such cases, the application that embeds SQLA would be responsible for providing updates to SQLA.

entry.title: BP Enable to Edit Certain Field
entry.content:
I am trying to explore on the BP field to enable user to edit only specific field, and have some issue.

How to enable user to only have access to edit the field Partner Function Role in BP (Under Purchasing).

The Field Group has been created and have been included in PFCG  and assigned to user, but user still not able to edit the field.

entry.title: Re: Unveiling today: SAP Build meets ABAP Cloud!
entry.content: Watch this demo, showing the latest advancements in SAP Build, including revolutionary GenAI capabilities that are transforming application development. Discover how to accelerate your SAP S/4HANA Cloud development projects with GenAI and Joule. This video walks you through adding custom fields, extending applications, integrating real data, and managing ABAP cloud projects using SAP Build and Joule.

entry.title: Re: C_TS4FI_2023 and C_S4CFI_2408
entry.content:
The first and foremost rationale to clear the SAP Finance (CE or PE) is to go through and learn the entire finance module exhaustively, which otherwise is very difficult. CE vis a vi PE versions: my take is that cloud is the way to go, most of the companies these days go for cloud implementation os sometimes hybrid model. So if I have to pick one, I will pick CE2408 or newer, but it is completely individual's choice. 

Along with the implementation experience certification adds credibility to our consulting role. Along with the core concepts, certification also teaches methodologies integration aspects and latest developments e.g. AI use cases, role based fiori concepts etc.

The best place to start learning is sap help portal. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Public Cloud - how to integrate external datas...
entry.content: Many thanks Sri for the guidance, greatly appreciated and sorry for late reply - please do not take delay as low estimation, it is in contrary very highly appreciated. Greetings, Y.

entry.title: Re: Writing Table data to csv or text file in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Yes but this would result in a File in a different System, a direct Export from DSP is not possible and I think this is the Question here @Satheesh9204 ? 
However you can manually export the Result of a Analytic Model when using the Preview Feature 😉 
But this is not something that you can schedule/automate

entry.title: #CoE#HHT How to add printer to SAP Cloud Print Manager for Pull Integration
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I'm trying to use SAP Cloud Print Manager. But it only has three printer option as attached in this screenshot. I have two questions as follows:

1.How to add a new local printer to it? 

2.Where to find the printed documents if I choose printer Microsoft Print to PDF?

Thanks so much if anyone know how to solve it.

entry.title: Re: 🔴 Filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment and in AEM
entry.content: Can we automatically filter on the key fields of the rap bdef where the event is declared?

entry.title: Re: T093B - Asset Accounting table issue
entry.content:
Hi

check in transaction OAOB if company code is assigned to chart of depreciation. You may also try to delete the depreciation area and create again and assign it to company code.

kind regards

entry.title: Re: 999 – The Number of the BSEG
entry.content:
Hello Samuel,

I'm not totally sure what happens in your system, but I have a suspicion: Did you maintain the “Independent Summarization of Entry View (BSEG)" for the AWTYP 'FKKSU'? FKKSU are the documents transferred from FI-CA to FI-GL. And these are never BSEG summarized, regardless of any OBCY customizing! (Please see note 336454 ). I know it's a bit sad, but for historical reasons FI-CA still reconciles their totals records against BSEG, so BSEG summarization is prevented (hard-coded) for the FI-CA transfer postings to GL. We don't have a 999 limitation for these postings (since FI-CA splits the transfer postings into smaller batches), but we do have the data volume issue. AND: BSEG summarization is also a precondition for ACDOCA summarization, i.e. you cannot summarize more in ACDOCA than in BSEG. (Technically, the ACDOCA-BUZEI is not cleared for ACDOCA summarization). So it's possible that your ACDOCA CO-PA characteristics are cleared (according to your configuration), but eventually the items are not summarized due to the missing BSEG summarization (BSEG-BUZEI).

What doesn't really fit to this story is the fact that you tell me BSEG-PAOBJNR is cleared. I'd have expected that for FKKSU postings, no BSEG summarization, but also no clearing of the maintained fields should happen. You might want to recheck in your system.

You might also want to create an incident for FI-CA for suggestions how to limit the data volume during transfer to GL.

Kind regards, Stefan

entry.title: Re: How to display action result data in Page using rules...
entry.content:
Hi @panushjain,

We are setting value in 'testValue' in ClientData but values are not getting displayed. Please check the attached screenshots.

Thanks and Regards,

Madhav

entry.title: Re: SSAM MDK Xcode distribution to App Store Connect fail...
entry.content: Based on this: https://me.sap.com/notes/3352943, I had to downgrade XCode to 15.4, now it works as before

entry.title: how to convert numbers to dimension member info in sac using scripting?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have manually inputed "202309" in my input field and I have a dropdown with numbers 1 to 6 in it. The initial requirement was to add the dropdown numbers to the input field value. Lets say if I choose 2 in dropdown the input field will show 202311 as a result. I used the below code and it worked fine.

var before_LC=ConvertUtils.stringToNumber(InputField_9.getValue())+ConvertUtils.stringToNumber(Dropdown_2.getSelectedKey());
ScriptVariable_1 = before_LC.toString();

 

Now the requirment is that I need that input field to read that value (202311) as a date dimension ID so that later I can have a date dimension member description for the value (which would be Nov 2023).

Do we have any script for that?

Any support would be appreciated.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Used case scenario of usage of AI in project functions
entry.content:
Hi All,

Have anybody used Gen AI in SAP any of the functions for SAP PS in their recent projects and can give some ideas in where they can be used potentially.

You can also give some links to any articles where SAP mentions any use cases.

 

Regards,

Suman Misra

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Public Cloud - how to integrate external datas...
entry.content: @yschlaeppi, Thanks for the feedback. Glad that it helped. All good. Good day.

entry.title: Re: Business application studio: dev space stuck in statu...
entry.content: yeah its working fine now

entry.title: Re: Asset Write-up (ABZU) for Prior Fiscal year in Prior...
entry.content: SAP does not allow write-ups to be posted in Prior Periods. Only Unplanned Dep. We had to post the write-up for prior years in the current year!

entry.title: Re: No PMR - Production material request EWM created
entry.content: WM request indicator is 2 in the profile and assigned to the material.

entry.title: Re: Getting a copy of SAP Certificate
entry.content:
Hi @paoladanaia 

Thank you for bringing this to our attention.
In order to provide individual support please create a ticket in our User Support Center

https://lso-ssrv-app.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/

To help the support team to understand your query better, could you please provide the following information in your correspondence?

  •            Detailed description of the issue
  •            Screenshots: To help us visualize the issue
  •            Please also provide the Course Code of course.

Kind regards,
Margit

entry.title: Re: No PMR - Production material request EWM created
entry.content: the status of Component in the production order is released and prod. material request created but when i go for /scwm/pmr the screen is empty also there is no log in SMQ2 or SMQ1

entry.title: How to connect 2 facts in SAC , one is a master data table and the other is the detailed table.
entry.content:
How to connect 2 facts in SAC , one is a master data table and the other is the detailed table.

Note : I succeeded to create star schema in my model in SAC ( at the modeler layer ) but I couldn't create a connection between two facts in the same model. 

is that applicable in SAP SAC !

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow Steps and Approval Logic
entry.content: @Elyas: I think you need to check the HR setup. But unfortunately that is not my core. But you can check the note https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2578294 which addresses a lot of issues of with the replication of the HR to business partner.

entry.title: Re: Activate change pointer for alternative CCH
entry.content:
HI Guru, Me again. 

Sorry to bother you with that but does some of you have at least some idea on how to manage that ? 

I would really appreciate your help. 

thank you in advance 😞

entry.title: Re: Exclude inactive condition from subtotal
entry.content: Be careful with exclusions, contiions inactive are used to calculate the subtotal if the condition should be print "a" in pricing procedure (only if customer delivered is in brazil)

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA - BADI (read-only Fields Properties) not found in service header
entry.content:
Hi all,
  In s4 Hana cloud key user Extensibility  in screen  'Create Customer Project' or 'Plan Customer Project'  we have created custom fields ' Currency Value' and 'Exchange Rate' are should be only make it has Read Only, this is requirement we got currently,  we have used 'Adapt UI' , 'Custom fields and logic'   and ' Badi'  and there is no Badi for read only, the Badi is available only for validations and creation of screen Create customer project of custom field, so there is no option to find for the custom field make it read only.
please if any knows this requirement tell me the procedure how do we make it field read only below the comment with screen shots, we are big thankful for who are helping on this requirement, its urgent requirement please expert person tell me the solution as soon as possible. 
thank you.

entry.title: Re: Changes In Funds Management with S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content: Hi Frank, thanks a lot for your reponse. You said this is changed for On-Prem also. But I believe that until the 2023 on-prem version, we still had Fund Centers and commitment items. In which on-prem version was this changed?

entry.title: PS Assessment Cycles impact on Budget
entry.content:
Hi Fans,

I would like to create assessment cycles to allocate costs from central WBS to regional WBS. However the central WBS's Budget must NOT be released when the costs are assessed to the Regional receiver WBS.

The receiver WBS's budget must also not be impacted (For this I'm thinking to exempt secondary CE from Budget AVAC settings). However for the central receiver, I need to budget to remain consumed.  

Using a settlement rule in the central receiver will ensure the budget remains consumed, but settlement rules are not practical to use where hundreds of WBS are being posted. 

Any ideas  welcome?

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights: Line Monitor features 2308/2311
entry.content: Is there any option to show the UNCHEDULED_DOWN cause (ex machine setup or alarm) ?=

entry.title: Re: webi time dimension returns blank in data; 1970 for 1...
entry.content:
Have you checked the SAP support page first?

Many bugs had to be fixed in SP4 and patch 2 is already out of date.
Patch 8 will be released this week.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

Let me also express my strong interest in the Digital Skills Initiative!

My name is Iryna Kriuchkova and I am from Ukraine. When the war started my husband joined Ukrainian Armed Forces and I together with our three children moved to Germany. Currently, I am actively learning (German language and AI) and looking for a job.

I hold two degrees: a Bachelor's in Computer science and a Master's in Accounting. I've been working in software development as a Business analyst/Product owner/Project manager. I also have some experience with ERP implementation. This is why I think I may be a good fit for the program and can quickly start bringing value as a SAP Consultant or even a SAP Developer.

I am super interested in Artificial intelligence (recently I joined the AI Fundamentals certification program) so here I would love to learn about all SAP's AI-related initiatives.

I will be happy to join and start this exciting journey!

 

Best regards,

Iryna Kriuchkova

entry.title: if billing accouting document is cleared,then user can not use vf11 to cancel the billing
entry.content:
Hello ,

there is a requirement.

if billing accouting document is cleared,then user can not use vf11 to cancel the billing

how to realize it ?

thank you so much!

entry.title: Re: Writing Table data to csv or text file in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Julian,

I understood the question like if DSP can write CSV files (probably as part of an automated data flow), not if it is possible to export the data on UI level.
If it is just about accessing data via excel, then ODBC access would also work (i have posted a link above), and you could then save it in whatever format you like.

Best Regards,

Nico

entry.title: Unable to install SAP Cloud Application Studio
entry.content:
I have a MAC, but I use Windows through Azure AVD. I should be able to install SAP Cloud Application Studio (SDK) and I have already downloaded it on my machine. The SDK requires Visual Studio version 15, which I also downloaded to my machine. I also downloaded the necessary extension 3, which is also needed to install the SDK. However, when I try to install the SDK, the system claims that I do not have the required extensions, even though the extensions have been downloaded. How do I get out of this?

I have the correct version of the SDK and likewise, as mentioned, I have downloaded the necessary extensions and software.

Can't the SDK be accessed via a virtual machine? Is that the reason? 

Any tips or advices are highly appreciated. 

Thanks in advance, 

BR:

Essi

entry.title: Re: Message "'UI Update' has encountered a problem." appe...
entry.content: Do you have any updates on this topic? Since last week I also get this error without previously changing anything in eclipse. Dark mode shouldn't be the problem, I'm not using it at the moment.

entry.title: Re: PDF printing in ABAP - How can I ensure the correct format (A4/A3)?
entry.content: I guess that the function module ADS_SR_OPEN creates a spool request, so you can change the page format by debug for the test.

entry.title: Re: The value of a Solution Standardization Board (SSB) as part of implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud, e
entry.content: Thank you @andremalan , no stress if not able to

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - Receive http request with multipart/forrm-d...
entry.content:
Hi larsgies,

you need to place the Multipart-Decoder between the https sender channel and your Groovy script with the option "Multipart Headers Inline" deselected. Also be sure to list the "content-type" http header in the "Allowed Header(s)" in your IFlow. Then the first part of the multipart message will become the message body and the other parts will be transferred as message attachments after the decoder step.

BR, Benjamin

entry.title: Re: SD Trade Finance Bank Guarantee FTR_TF_INTG Message as Error
entry.content: Hello Experts, Could you please advise how to trigger warning message when a financical document created using FTR_create is assigned to Sales Order. Could you please advise on the relevant configuration for this. We are assigning Letter of Credit (Financial document) in sales order. please advise. Thank you, kind regards

entry.title: Re: PDF printing in ABAP - How can I ensure the correct f...
entry.content: Thanks for posting the code inside your question. You may virtually delete this non-solution post by editing it/indicating "deleted" for instance.

entry.title: Re: Issue with displaying multiple subitems in CAMT.053 f...
entry.content: The screenshot that I have provided is from SAP documentation. We need similar the case where there is multiple subitems but unable to find. Can you please help me how to get multiple subitems

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification 2024 Discount code
entry.content: Hi @venkatraomadasu - I see you didn't get a response. You could check out the reply from @AngelaSlifer in another thread here, as I believe the content is also valid for you.

entry.title: Re: MDG: Dump while creating Change Request
entry.content:
If you see the Error in Accessing File Upload and Download in the path: 

Financial Accounting Governance àMultiple Object processing àFile Upload/Download



Below Resolution steps helped me to solve issue - 3311756 - Setting 0G Data Model as default while opening File Upload in MDG. As mentioned in one of replies, adjust Model from 0F to 0G in USMD2000 - Personalization: Default Data Model.

 

Thanks, 
Anil

entry.title: Send Notification Approval Request to Users if the Vendor Master Changed
entry.content:
Hello 
I have Requirement to Send Mail Notification or Workflow Approval to MY Inbox if the Vendor Master Data Changed for the Sensitive Field that Customized at SPRO > FA > AR and AP > Vendor Accounts > Master Data > Preparations for Creating Vendor Master Data > Define Sensitive Fields for Dual Control (Vendors)
that Need approval through FK08.

entry.title: Re: Badi implementation in fb70
entry.content:
So, you mean that you don't know the type of the variable returned by the method GET_DATA of CL_EDOC_SOURCE, because the type is generic:

  methods GET_DATA
    exporting
      value(ES_DATA) type ANY .

Hopefully you can get the data reference via GET_DATA_REFERENCE:

  methods GET_DATA_REFERENCE
    returning
      value(RD_DATA) type ref to DATA .

Your code will be:

DATA(ld_data) = io_source->get_data_reference( ).
ASSIGN ld_data->* TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_data>).

entry.title: Re: How to create Row level Security on user groups in Da...
entry.content:
If you have S/4, you can create a CDS view using the tables usrbf2 and ust12 to get a list of users who have access on S/4 for certain cost centers.  You can then use this CDS view in Datasphere for your DAC.  

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: Specific description of CoA:YCOA
entry.content:
Dear All,

Regarding to CoA:YCOA, I have to share specific descliption of all Account codes.
Because my customer can not understand YCOA's Account without description every account codes.
If there is document or site that specific description of every accounts of CoA:YCOA, let me know.
※ I have already seen BP_CLD_ENTPR_2408_Account_Master_Data_for_YCOA.xlsx of Process navigator.

Best Regards,

Yuki Tsumura

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA - BADI (read-only Fields Properties) not found in service header
entry.content: Hi all, In s4 Hana cloud key user Extensibility in screen 'Create Customer Project' or 'Plan Customer Project' we have created custom fields ' Currency Value' and 'Exchange Rate' are should be only make it has Read Only, this is requirement we got currently, we have used 'Adapt UI' , 'Custom fields and logic' and ' Badi' and there is no Badi for read only, the Badi is available only for validations and creation of screen Create customer project of custom field, so there is no option to find for the custom field make it read only. please if any knows this requirement tell me the procedure how do we make it field read only below the comment with screen shots, we are big thankful for who are helping on this requirement, its urgent requirement please expert person tell me the solution as soon as possible. thank you.

entry.title: How to create hovering effect in SAP Build apps
entry.content:
Hi,

We are developing an app and would like to change the color of the container (inside soft tabs) on mouse hover. How can we achieve this in SAP Build Apps?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to create Row level Security on user groups in Da...
entry.content:
With regards to hierarchies, take a look at the DAC for CDS view I_PROFITCENTERHIERARCHY.  Again this is only if you have S/4HANA.

Regards,

Mel Calucin
